nodes.name: Rufous-sided warbling finch
nodes.summary: The rufous-sided warbling finch (Poospizopsis hypocondria) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in the Andes of Bolivia and northern Argentina as well as the Sierras de Córdoba. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. Gallery References
